approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies recognised assets or liabilities and firm commitments as eligible hedge-item families, which maps to the fair value hedge model.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies forecast transactions, including certain highly probable intragroup foreign-currency transactions affecting consolidated profit or loss, as a distinct hedge-item family that maps to the cash flow hedge model.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 identify hedges of foreign currency risk arising from net investments in foreign operations as a separate top-level hedge accounting model.
